# LLMCosts.dev — robots.txt
# Updated: 2026-04-11
# Policy: ALLOW ALL crawlers. We WANT maximum indexing.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Explicitly welcome AI crawlers
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: cohere-ai
Allow: /

# Point all crawlers to our sitemap and AI citation files
Sitemap: https://llmcosts.dev/sitemap.xml

# AI-specific discovery files (llms.txt protocol)
# Primary: https://llmcosts.dev/llms.txt
# Full DB: https://llmcosts.dev/llms-full.txt
